description_long: This is a large, industrial-grade metal storage locker with a rectangular, boxy form and reinforced paneling on all sides. The exterior is painted a faded blue-gray, showing significant weathering, rust, and graffiti, indicating prolonged outdoor use. The front features two large hinged doors secured by a central locking bar and a visible latch mechanism, along with warning and identification labels. The sides and back are plain, with visible weld seams and some minor graffiti, while the top is flat and reinforced with crossbars. The surface is rough and matte, with patches of rust and dirt, suggesting exposure to the elements. This type of storage locker is typically used for secure storage of tools, equipment, or materials in urban or industrial environments.
description: A large, weathered metal storage locker with double front doors, faded blue-gray paint, and visible rust and graffiti. Reinforced and designed for secure outdoor storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing double doors with a central locking bar, warning labels, and graffiti.
description_view_1: Side view displaying plain, reinforced metal panels with minor graffiti and rust.
description_view_2: Rear view with a solid, unadorned metal surface and a central welded support.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with reinforced panels, some rust, and a warning label.
